name: Microwave Fudge (from Sear's Microwave Cookbo
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, butter, and milk in a 2-quart glass mixing bowl.
2. Cook on high (70%) for 2 to 3 minutes, or until the mixture begins to boil.
3. Remove from heat and stir well.
4. Cook on high for 2 to 3 minutes, or until the mixture boils and sugar is completely dissolved.
5. Stir in marshmallows (10 miniature marshmallows equal 1 large marshmallow) and chocolate chips, beating until smooth.
6. Do not delay this step; the fudge will set up rapidly.
7. Stir in nuts and vanilla, then spread the mixture into an 8-inch buttered baking dish.
8. Cool. Cut into 1-inch squares.
